IDENTITÉ
Therapeutics
Ocular Surface · A2A
ARRIVAL
DWELL
BINDING
CASCADE
RESOLUTION
CALM
First-in-class topical A2A agonist

The surface,
resolved.

Topical regadenoson — a single molecule that repairs, hydrates, and calms the ocular surface.
Scroll
Dwell 02

It holds,
then clears.

A mucoadhesive CMC/HA vehicle tunes residence — long enough to engage the surface across the repair window, short enough to clear.

vehicle · occupancy × dwell × interval
Binding 03

One molecule.
One receptor.

Regadenoson docks the orthosteric pocket of the adenosine A2A receptor — a Gαs-coupled GPCR on the surface epithelium and resident macrophages.

A2A · 7TM GPCR · Ki ≈ 1.3 µM
Cascade 04

The signal
cascades.

A2A activates Gαs → adenylyl cyclase → cAMP → PKA — the second-messenger relay that drives the two effects downstream.

Gαs → AC → cAMP → PKA
Resolution 05

Two axes,
one molecule.

PKA opens CFTR — bicarbonate and water unfold existing mucin into a functional gel. In parallel, A2A brakes the inflamed macrophage, switching M1 toward resolving M2.

CFTR · HCO3- → mucin · M1→M2
Calm 06

The surface
calms.

Hyperosmolarity falls, the film stabilizes, the epithelium recovers — the vicious cycle wound down at its source.

osmolarity · 316 → 301 mOsm/L*

Upstream of the surface-control loop.

Not another anti-inflammatory drop. A localized, pulsed, surface-restricted agonist of the body's own resolution signal.

IDENTITÉ Therapeutics
The Untouched Axis

A new axis in
dry eye treatment

For decades, therapy has focused on a single branch of the immune system. The innate immunity axis — and specifically macrophage polarization — has remained entirely unaddressed.

Pro-inflammatoryAnti-inflammatory
Adaptive Immunity

Targeted by existing drugs

Cyclosporine and lifitegrast suppress activated T-cells. They do not directly engage the innate immune system.

Cyclosporine Lifitegrast
Innate Immunity

Untouched until now

No approved therapy directly engages innate immune resolution. Regadenoson is the first to target A2A-driven macrophage repolarization.

Regadenoson · Topical A2A Agonist
M1 → M2
Macrophage repolarization
A2A + A1
Dual receptor
cAMP / Ca2+
Dual signaling
Orthogonal
Additive to existing
Development Pipeline

Our path forward

Observational Cohort Filamentary Keratitis / Severe Dry Eye
Preclinical Safety Ophthalmic GLP Toxicology
IND Enabling Biomarker-Enriched Dry Eye Trial
505

505(b)(2) Regulatory Pathway

Leveraging the existing Lexiscan NDA for systemic safety. Only route-specific ophthalmic data needs to be generated new. This dramatically de-risks development.

Our Identity

Rooted in
resilience

The bristlecone pine thrives for thousands of years in the harshest conditions. Like the tree, we believe in patient endurance and deep roots in science.

Identité

Root · Identity · Origin
